author: Cross Keys Chatteris
text: Great location, rooms are large and comfortable. Will definitely return on our next visit to Daytona.

author: Larry Strickland
text: Friendly service and good breakfast. Clean rooms and helpful staff. Good value for the area.

author: Chris Benson
text: No lights in the hallways, cockroaches in the room. Reported to management and they did not care at all. Terrible experience.

author: Cesar Fernandes
text: Breakfast had great variety, staff was kind and accommodating. They even received packages for me. Would recommend.

author: Peyton Powell
text: Daytona 500 weekend was chaos. Parking situation was completely mismanaged. Witnessed unsafe behavior from hotel employees. Would not stay here again.

author: Amanda Ringstad
text: Front desk staff member Viktor appeared impaired and refused to provide any assistance. Completely unprofessional. Avoid this hotel.

author: MICH618
text: Breakfast was good even past 10am. Loved the balcony and the room was clean. Nice stay overall.

author: Kosha
text: Mildewed smell throughout the room. Several floor lights were out in the hallway. Found a dirty stain on the bedding and spotted roaches. Very disappointing.
